info.name: XYZ Football API
info.description:
Complete API collection for XYZ Football API.

**Quick Start:**
1. Login with POST /login to get a JWT token.
2. The token is auto-saved to the `token` variable.
3. All protected endpoints use this token automatically.

**Default Credentials:**
- Username: admin
- Password: password

formdata.description: Optional: attach a logo image file
